about.description: Creative Developer based near Milan, specializing  in game Technical Design and tech art for video games. Combining strong programming skills with artistic vision, I create innovative and engaging digital experiences.
about.description2: Passionate about pushing the boundaries of technology and art, I thrive on challenges that require both technical expertise and creative problem-solving.

project1.title: Deadly Nightshade
descriptions: Is a narrative game set in a future where nature and technology intertwine in unsettling ways. The story follows Alice, a young scientist, and Rusty, a small robot she secretly builds. After escaping from the lab, they uncover dark truths about the company they once trusted, forming a deep bond along the way.

As the Technical Designer, I played a crucial role in shaping the gameplay mechanics and user experience. I designed and implemented the core game systems, including the health system, power-ups, and gas mechanics for both the protagonist and enemies. My responsibilities also included creating the user interface using Figma and Common UI, which encompassed the inventory, settings, and main menu.

I was mainly responsible for the health system and power-ups for both the protagonist and the enemies, using gas mechanics. I designed and programmed the UI with Figma and Common UI, creating the inventory, settings, and main menu. I also handled level design and environmental puzzles.

project3.description: Help a cloud mom rescue her lost cloudlets.

project5.title: Too Poop To Go
descriptions: In this iOS application, users can quickly find the best restroom to suit their needs. The map, managed with MapBox, allows users to view a wide range of points of interest that can be filtered according to various parameters. For each restroom, users can read reviews left by others. If a user discovers a new restroom to share with the community, they can submit a request to add it, and it will be included only after careful verification by the administrators.

I was responsible for the entire design of the application, from the user interface to the user experience. I created the wireframes and prototypes using Figma, ensuring a user-friendly and intuitive design. I also implemented the front-end using React Native, ensuring a smooth and responsive experience across different devices. Additionally, I integrated the MapBox API to display restroom locations and manage user interactions with the map.
The application is designed to be user-friendly and intuitive, allowing users to quickly find the best restroom for their needs.
